must_include: why the cited evidence supports the prompt or block
must_not_include: guarantees of permit eligibility or approval
claims based on live DevHub state

stale_evidence_holds.trigger: Fixture freshness status indicates a changed public source hash.
stale_evidence_holds.agent_response: Hold consequential recommendations and request updated public evidence validation.

stale_evidence_holds.trigger: Fixture surface map has not been revalidated after a release decision.
stale_evidence_holds.agent_response: Limit output to read-only explanation and manual handoff.

reversible_draft: Prepare draft field mappings from known facts.
Describe save-for-later or draft-only behavior as requiring user attendance when DevHub is involved.
Stop before upload, certification, submission, payment, scheduling, cancellation, or official state change.
local_pdf_preview: Generate local preview descriptions from fixture field mappings only.
Do not read private local files unless the user provides them in a separate attended flow.
Do not represent a local preview as an official PP&D submission.

exact_confirmation_checkpoints.required_confirmation: Exact user confirmation naming the document, destination, and permit or request context.
Exact user confirmation naming the application and final submit action.
Exact user confirmation of the certification text and action.
Exact user confirmation of fee amount, payment target, and final payment action.
Exact user confirmation of inspection type, date or cancellation target, and official action.

manual_handoff_surfaces: DevHub login, MFA, CAPTCHA, and account recovery
official upload, submit, certify, payment, scheduling, cancellation, and correction workflows
ambiguous, conflicting, stale, or uncited requirement evidence
permit paths that official guidance says may use email or non-DevHub handling

agent_may_show: steps needed to discard or revise a draft
agent_must_not_claim: rollback of inspection scheduling or cancellation
